settings.title: Handcrafted
settings.text: Each stone set by hand, one at a time, under 10x magnification by our master artisans.

settings.title: Direct Pricing
settings.text: No retail markups. We work directly with our craftspeople to offer honest, transparent pricing.

settings.title: Fully Insured
settings.text: Every bracelet ships with full insurance coverage and tracked delivery to your door.

settings.title: Made to Order
settings.text: Your bracelet is crafted fresh, not pulled from a shelf. 15 business days from order to dispatch.

settings.label: Our Story
settings.heading: Every Bracelet Has a Maker
settings.story:
I started Pinaka because I believed something was missing in the jewellery world: a tennis bracelet that was genuinely handcrafted, honestly priced, and made with the kind of care you'd expect from a family jeweler.

Every Pinaka bracelet begins as raw gold and loose diamonds. Our artisans set each stone by hand, one at a time, under 10x magnification. There are no shortcuts. No mass production. Just quiet, careful work that takes 15 business days from order to dispatch.

We work directly with our craftspeople, which means no retail markups and no middlemen. The same quality you'd find at a luxury boutique, at a price that reflects the actual cost of materials and skilled labour.

Each bracelet ships fully insured, in a hand-finished box, with a certificate of authenticity. If you ever have a question, you can email me directly. I read every message.
